tracks.meaning: a measure of interest charged or paid on a loan, deposit, or investment, typically expressed as a percentage per annum
the speed or frequency at which something occurs or is measured
to evaluate, assess, or determine the level, quality, or worth of something
to consider something as having a certain status or importance
an official assessment or charge levied as punishment or compensation
the degree or extent to which something is successful or valued
to record the speed or scoring performance of a player or competitor
the odds or probability offered on a wager or bet
the speed at which wind moves or the measure of wind velocity
to estimate the speed or progress of a ship through water
a measure of bodily functions such as heart rate or metabolic rate
the pace or tempo at which events or processes occur
a measure of data transmission speed or processing frequency
a fixed price or charge established for a service or commodity
